title: OG Fireflies
description: This small Resource Pack make Fireflies appear like they were shown at Minecraft Live 2021!
body: Make Fireflies appear like they were intended to be This small Resource Pack make Fireflies appear like they were shown at Minecraft Live 2021! Fireflies will now have 2 pixels. Their behavior remains the same. ------------------------- ### 👨🏼‍💻 How to contribute Anyone can contribute to OG Fireflies, suggesting their ideas [using the Feature Request module](https://github.com/JimiIT92/OG-Fireflies/issues/new?assignees=JimiIT92&labels=enhancement&template=feature_request.md&title=) If your idea makes it to the resource pack you'll also be mentioned in the resource pack's credits! 😁 ------------------------- ### 😁 Conclusion I hope you enjoy OG Fireflies as much as I enjoy develop new ideas and content for it, and let me know if there are any issues on the [issue tracker](https://github.com/JimiIT92/OG-Fireflies/issues/new?assignees=JimiIT92&labels=enhancement&template=bug_report.md&title=). Have a nice day! 😁
